overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene set in a dimly lit Victorian-style room with wooden paneling and a lit stone fireplace. The camera slowly pans left across the room, revealing a piano, a deceased animal on an ornate rug, and antique furniture. The atmospheric horror setting features warm firelight casting shadows across the traditional wooden interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian parlor with fireplace and piano

agents.ego_description: slowly panning view across the room, examining the interior details and the deceased animal on the floor

entered.detail: lit stone fireplace with burning logs and ornate mantelpiece
dark wooden upright piano with carved details and sheet music stand
round wooden piano stool with upholstered seat
large patterned rug with geometric border designs covering the wooden floor
upholstered armchair with high back and wooden legs
tall window with heavy red drapes showing dark night outside
tall floor lamp with fabric shade next to the seating area

segments.scene_description: The camera slowly pans left across a dimly lit Victorian parlor, revealing a lit stone fireplace, an upright piano, and antique furniture. A deceased animal lies prominently on the ornate rug in the center. The warm firelight casts flickering shadows across the wooden paneling as the view shifts to show the window with red curtains and wingback chairs on the left side of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous pan across a dimly lit Victorian parlor that shifts from the warmth of a hearth to the shadowed corners of the room. It begins by capturing a lit stone fireplace and an upright piano, where flickering firelight casts deep shadows across the wooden paneling. As the camera glides left, the view passes over a deceased animal lying prominently on an ornate rug in the center of the floor. The scene then expands to reveal the far side of the room, moving past antique furniture before finally settling on wingback chairs positioned beside a window with heavy red curtains.
